question: In Unity 6, Rigidbody.drag was renamed to what? Property name only.
In Unity 6, Rigidbody.angularDrag was renamed to what? Property name only.
In Unity 6, FindObjectOfType (singular) is deprecated. What is the replacement that returns the FIRST match? Method name only.
In Unity 6, which awaitable type lets you 'await' the next frame instead of using a coroutine? Type name only.
Does the C# null-conditional operator (obj?.member) correctly respect Unity's overridden null check for a Destroyed object? Answer yes or no.
With the new Input System, which Keyboard key property is true only on the frame the key went down? Property name only.
Which generic class in UnityEngine.Pool provides a ready-made object pool? Class name only.
Does Time.timeScale = 0 pause a coroutine's 'yield return new WaitForSeconds(1f)'? Answer yes or no.
Can you compile 'transform.position.x = 5f;' directly in Unity C#? Answer yes or no.
In Unity 6, FindObjectOfType that returns ANY match (cheaper, no sorting) is called what? Method name only.
Is it safe to use the C# null-coalescing operator (??) with a UnityEngine.Object reference? Answer yes or no.
For OnTriggerEnter to fire, at least one of the colliders must have which boolean enabled? Property name only.
Does OnCollisionEnter fire when BOTH colliders are marked isTrigger? Answer yes or no.
To compare two distances without a square root, compare which Vector3 property instead of magnitude? Property name only.
Is UnityEngine.Vector3 a class or a struct? One word.
How long does 'yield return null' pause a coroutine? Short answer.
Which call logs a WARNING to the Unity Console? Answer Class.Method.
Which namespace contains SceneManager? Answer the namespace.
Which base class do you derive from for a data-container asset (not attached to a GameObject)? Class name only.
Which callback runs every fixed physics step? Method name only.
Which method returns a component via an out parameter and a bool success? Method name only.
Which LayerMask static method converts a layer name string to its integer index? Answer Class.Method or method name.
Which yield instruction class waits until the end of the current frame? Class name only.
Which Mathf method clamps a float into the 0..1 range? Method name only.
Which Quaternion static property is the no-rotation identity? Property name only.
Which UnityEngine.Random member returns a float in [0,1]? Answer Class.member or member.
Which MonoBehaviour callback runs in the editor when a serialized value is changed in the Inspector? Method name only.
What is the return type of a coroutine method in Unity? Type name only.
Which attribute keeps a field's serialized data after you rename it in code? Attribute name only.
Which Vector3 static method returns the linear interpolation between two points? Method name only.
Which attribute auto-adds a required component to a GameObject when the script is added? Attribute name only.
Which C# keyword declares a compile-time constant? Keyword only.
What does GetComponent<T>() return if the component is not present? One word.
Which C# keyword makes a field assignable only in its declaration or constructor? Keyword only.
Using LINQ (e.g. .Where().ToList()) inside Update each frame mainly risks what? One or two words.
Which is the more efficient tag check: CompareTag or comparing gameObject.tag with ==? Answer the method name.
Boxing a struct (e.g. storing an int in an object) on the hot path causes what? One or two words.
To cache a GetComponent result so it is not fetched every frame, you typically do it in which callback? One method name.
Which attribute marks an enum as a bit-flags combination? Attribute name only.
Forgetting to unsubscribe from a C# event before an object is destroyed can cause what? Two words.
Which operator should you NOT use to null-check a possibly-Destroyed Unity Object: == null, or ?. ? Answer the unsafe one.
Which C# operator gets a member's name as a string at compile time? Operator/keyword only.
Which callback runs once after all Update calls each frame? Method name only.
Which Transform method makes it face a target position? Method name only.
Which method adds a component of a given type to a GameObject at runtime? Method name only.
